summary: Iteration 158: Universal Game Core + Rock Hounding Module - ALL TESTS PASSED (29/29 backend, all frontend UI verified). New features: Universal Game Controller architecture with Soul-to-Game Bridge (commit-reward endpoint), Rock Hounding module with procedural mines, specimen discovery, collection/catalog system, and Nexus element feeding.
seed_data_creation: Mining actions created specimen discoveries (Moss Agate, Peridot, Malachite, Emerald, Jade, Green Tourmaline). XP, dust, and stats awarded via commit-reward endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Universal Game Core and Rock Hounding module fully implemented. Key endpoints: GET /api/game-core/stats (level, currencies, stats), GET /api/game-core/modules (registered modules), POST /api/game-core/commit-reward (Soul-to-Game Bridge), GET /api/game-core/transactions, GET /api/rock-hounding/mine (biome, depths, energy), POST /api/rock-hounding/mine-action (mining), GET /api/rock-hounding/collection, GET /api/rock-hounding/catalog, POST /api/rock-hounding/reset-mine. Key data-testids: rock-hounding-page, biome-card, energy-bar, core-stats-hud, depth-1 through depth-5, tab-mine, tab-collection, tab-catalog, rh-nexus-link, rh-rpg-link, reset-mine-btn, specimen-card, collection-tab, catalog-tab, nexus-game-modules, nexus-rock-hounding-link, rpg-game-modules, rpg-rock-hounding-link, rpg-nexus-link, rpg-dream-realms-link.

GET /api/game-core/stats.details: Returns level (level, total_xp, percentage), currencies (cosmic_dust, stardust_shards), stats (wisdom, vitality, resonance with value, name, color)

GET /api/game-core/modules.details: Returns modules list including rock_hounding with name, description, icon, color, stat_mapping

POST /api/game-core/commit-reward (XP).details: Awards XP correctly, returns updated level info

POST /api/game-core/commit-reward (dust).details: Awards cosmic_dust correctly, returns updated currencies

POST /api/game-core/commit-reward (nexus.details: Feeds element to Nexus decoded modifiers, returns '+1 element'

POST /api/game-core/commit-reward (full.details: Handles XP, dust, stat, and element in single request

GET /api/game-core/transactions.details: Returns transaction history with type, timestamp, source

GET /api/rock-hounding/mine.details: Returns mine session with biome (name, element, color, description), depths (5 layers), energy_info (current, max)

POST /api/rock-hounding/mine-action (dep.details: Returns specimen with name, element, actual_rarity, rewards (xp, dust, stat, stat_delta), energy, level

GET /api/rock-hounding/collection.details: Returns collection, total_discovered, total_possible, completion percentage, by_element grouping

GET /api/rock-hounding/catalog.details: Returns catalog (30+ specimens), total, discovered count, with discovery status

POST /api/rock-hounding/reset-mine.details: Closes current mine, creates new mine with full energy

Frontend: Rock Hounding page renders.details: Page loads at /rock-hounding with all UI elements

Frontend: Mine tab shows biome card.details: Biome card shows name (Verdant Cavern), element color, harmony score, energy bar

Frontend: Depth layers displayed.details: 5 depth layers shown, Depth 1 unlocked, others locked based on harmony

Frontend: Mining discovers specimen.details: Clicking Depth 1 shows specimen card with rewards, toast notification

Frontend: Core Stats HUD.details: Shows level, XP progress bar, dust, wisdom/vitality/resonance stats

Frontend: Collection tab.details: Shows discovered specimens grouped by element with completion percentage

Frontend: Catalog tab.details: Shows all specimens with discovered/undiscovered status

Frontend: Navigation links.details: Nexus and RPG links navigate correctly

Frontend: Nexus Game Modules section.details: Nexus page shows Game Modules section with Rock Hounding link

Frontend: RPG Game Modules bar.details: RPG page shows quick access bar with Rock Hounding, Nexus, Dreams links

game_core_architecture.universal_game_controller_hook: useGameController.js provides nexusState, coreStats, distortions, commitReward()
game_core_architecture.game_module_wrapper: GameModuleWrapper.js applies harmony-driven visual effects (blur, grain, glitch)
game_core_architecture.soul_to_game_bridge: POST /api/game-core/commit-reward accepts module_id, xp, dust, stat, stat_delta, element
